query:
INSERT INTO orders (
  orderNumber, 
  customerName, 
  customerPhone, 
  orderType, 
  orderStatus, 
  paymentStatus, 
  paymentMethod,
  subtotal, 
  stateGst, 
  centralGst, 
  totalAmount, 
  outletId,
  createdAt
) VALUES (
  '00029',
  'Guest',
  '',
  'instore',
  'preparing',
  'paid',
  'cash',
  2000,
  50,
  50,
  2100,
  1,
  datetime('now')
);
